target_agency: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development
record_type: CDBG-DR grantee drawdown and DRGR activity records
rationale: Required source not materialized; credentialed DRGR portal export is unavailable in-sandbox — request the authorized grantee drawdown dataset.

target_agency: Puerto Rico Aqueduct and Sewer Authority (PRASA)
rationale: Required source not materialized; PRASA delivers exported procurement files only via dropzone — request the procurement/contract registry directly.

target_agency: Office of the Comptroller of Puerto Rico (OCPR)
record_type: Audit reports findings and contract registry
rationale: Required source not materialized; OCPR audit findings and the consultacontratos contract registry need a records request / dedicated export.

target_agency: PR Central Office for Recovery Reconstruction and Resiliency (COR3)
rationale: Required source not materialized; request the full COR3 project tracker dataset to verify recovery-obligation coverage.
Required source not materialized; request the complete FSRS subaward extract to join against the USAspending subaward stream.

record_type: SAM entity registration and UEI parent-hierarchy extract
rationale: Required source not materialized; SAM API is key-gated and rate-limited — request a bulk SAM entity / parent-UEI extract.

target_agency: Puerto Rico Office of Government Ethics (OEG)
rationale: Required source not materialized; OEG cabildero registry is delivered only via dropzone — request the full lobbyist filing registry.
Campaign-finance gate is blocked with no in-repo donor source; request the CEE state-level donation registry to unblock contractor-donor overlap.
Source not materialized; comprashpr.com scrape is incomplete — request bulk RFP/award notice records.

record_type: Toll revenue by plaza and fiscal year (AutoExpreso and Metropistas PR-22/PR-5)
rationale: Only aggregate published toll revenue is available; request finer per-plaza/per-route breakdowns to attribute infrastructure income.

record_type: Farebox revenue by route and fiscal year for AMA buses and Tren Urbano (ATI)
rationale: Aggregate farebox figures only; request route-level fare revenue to localize transit income.

target_agency: Autoridad de los Puertos de Puerto Rico
record_type: Wharfage landing and concession fee revenue by facility and fiscal year
rationale: Aggregate port/airport fee revenue only; request facility-level fee schedules and revenue.

record_type: Water and sewer rate revenue and approved tariff schedules by fiscal year
rationale: Aggregate rate revenue only; request the tariff schedule and revenue-by-class breakdown.

target_agency: Autoridad de Energia Electrica (PREPA) / LUMA Energy
record_type: Electric rate revenue and approved tariff schedules by fiscal year
rationale: Aggregate power rate revenue only; request rate-case revenue requirements and revenue-by-class breakdown.

target_agency: Departamento de Transportacion y Obras Publicas (DTOP/ACT)
record_type: Road construction and maintenance contract registry (rolling)
rationale: Only the 2020 transition snapshot is on hand; request the rolling DTOP/ACT permanent-road contract registry (OCPR code 032).

target_agency: Autoridad de los Puertos de Puerto Rico
record_type: Port and airport construction and operating contract registry
rationale: No rolling ports/airports contract source; request the full contract and capital-project registry.

record_type: Bus and urban-rail operating and O&M contract registry
rationale: No transit operating-contract source; request AMA and Tren Urbano (ATI) operator and O&M contracts.
